title: A Surprise at Work
content: Emma expected an ordinary day at the office when she arrived on Friday morning. However, as soon as she entered the meeting room, her coworkers suddenly started clapping and smiling. They had organized a small surprise celebration for her recent promotion. The table was covered with snacks, coffee, and a cake decorated with congratulations written in colorful icing. Emma felt genuinely touched because she had not expected anyone to plan something so thoughtful. During the celebration, her manager gave a short speech about her hard work and dedication. The unexpected surprise transformed what began as a normal workday into one of the happiest moments of her career.
